title: The Colossal Dragon
description: The mountain trembles as an enormous dragon rises above the clouds. Its shadow covers the valley, and its burning eyes settle upon you.

options.title: Stand Before It
options.description: You refuse to run, placing yourself between the dragon and the valley.
options.result: The dragon's fury meets the history you share. It pauses long enough for the valley to see that courage can change even a creature of legend.
options.locked_reason: Your path through the dragon's story did not earn the trust or resolve needed to stand before it.

options.title: Attempt to Command It
options.description: You step forward and demand that the colossal creature submit to your will.
options.result: You speak with the authority your earlier choices created. The dragon recognizes either a teacher—or someone ruthless enough to be obeyed.
options.locked_reason: Nothing in your history with the dragon gives you the authority to command it.

options.title: Steal Its Hoard
options.description: While the dragon turns toward the valley, you slip into its cavern and seize whatever treasure you can carry.
options.result: You use everything you learned about the dragon to reach its hoard. You escape wealthy, leaving the valley to face what follows.
options.locked_reason: Your earlier path never revealed the weakness needed to reach the hoard safely.
